parameters.subject: =New Task Assigned: {{$json.task_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.responsible_person_first_name}} {{$json.responsible_person_last_name}},

You have been assigned a new task requiring your attention.

Task Details

Task Title {{$json.task_title}}
Description {{$json.description}}
Status {{$json.status}}
Priority {{$json.priority}}
Assigned To {{$json.responsible_person_first_name}} {{$json.responsible_person_last_name}}
Start Date {{$json.task_start_date}}
Planned End Date {{$json.task_end_date}}
Estimated Time (hrs) {{$json.estimated_time}}
Project Name {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone Name {{$json.milestone_title}}
Task Link View Task Details

Please begin execution and keep the task status updated.

Regards,
Task Management System

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id            AS task_id,
  t.title         AS task_title,
  t.description,
  t.status,
  t.priority,
  t.target_date,
  t.created_at    AS task_created_at,
  t.parent_id     AS parent_id,
  t.estimated_hour AS estimated_time,
  CONVERT_TZ(t.expected_start_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS task_start_date,
  CONVERT_TZ(t.target_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS task_end_date,

  -- milestone
  m.id            AS milestone_id,
  m.title         AS milestone_title,

  -- project
  pm.id           AS project_id,
  pm.title        AS project_title,

  -- responsible person
  u.id            AS responsible_person_id,
  u.firstname     AS responsible_person_first_name,
  u.lastname      AS responsible_person_last_name,
  u.email         AS responsible_person_email,

  -- observers (aggregated)
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.firstname) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.lastname) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.email) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements t

JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- join task_users for observers
LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

-- join spree_users again for observer details
LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  t.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL

GROUP BY t.id;
